---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Quick Summary

> One sentence: What broke and what did you expect?

## Impact

**How does this affect you?**

- [ ] Can't complete a task
- [ ] Annoying but have workaround
- [ ] Feature partially broken
- [ ] Data loss or security concern

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to...
2. Click on...
3. See error

**Expected:** What should happen
**Actual:** What actually happened

## Environment

**Which app?**

- [ ] Guidance (task management)
- [ ] Knowledge (notes)
- [ ] Tracking (inventory)

**Platform:**

- [ ] Desktop (Windows/Mac/Linux)
- [ ] Mobile (iOS/Android)

**Version:** [e.g., 0.1.0 or commit hash]

## Additional Context

**Screenshots/recordings:** (if helpful)

**Error messages:** (copy/paste any errors)

**Related issues:** (link any similar issues)

---

> 💡 **Tip:** The more details, the faster we can fix it!
> ⚠️ **Privacy:** Don't share passwords or personal data
